posts.title: The Power of Parallel Thinking
posts.content: Parallel thinking is a term coined by Edward de Bono. It is a thinking process where the focus is in specific directions. When done in a group, it avoids the traditional adversarial approach of argument and debate...
posts.excerpt: Explore how parallel thinking can transform your creative process and problem-solving abilities.

seo.title: The Power of Parallel Thinking
seo.description: Learn about parallel thinking and its benefits.

posts.title: Why Young Builders Should Document Their Journey
posts.content: Documentation is the most underrated skill for young entrepreneurs. It creates a trail of your growth, helps others learn from your mistakes, and builds your personal brand in public...
posts.excerpt: The importance of building in public and documenting your startup journey from day one.

seo.title: Why Young Builders Should Document Their Journey
seo.description: The value of building in public.

posts.title: Lessons From a First Startup Failure
posts.content: Failure is not the opposite of success; it is part of it. My first startup taught me more about product-market fit, team dynamics, and cash flow than any business school ever could...
posts.excerpt: A raw look at what went wrong with my first venture and the lessons I carried forward.

seo.title: Lessons From a First Startup Failure
seo.description: What I learned from my first failed startup.

posts.title: College Beyond Classrooms
posts.content: The real value of college is not in the curriculum, but in the community. It is the only time in your life where you are surrounded by thousands of ambitious peers with nothing to lose...
posts.excerpt: How to maximize your university years by focusing on networks, projects, and exploration.

posts.title: Building Before 25
posts.content: There is a unique advantage to starting young. You have high energy, low opportunity cost, and a fresh perspective that incumbents often lack...
posts.excerpt: Why your early twenties are the best time to take massive risks and build something new.

posts.title: Chaos, Curiosity, and Creativity
posts.content: Creativity thrives in the space between order and chaos. By following your curiosity without a fixed destination, you often find the most innovative solutions...
posts.excerpt: Embracing uncertainty as a catalyst for creative breakthroughs and personal discovery.

seo.title: Chaos, Curiosity, and Creativity
seo.description: The link between chaos and creativity.

settings.siteDescription: A modern, editorial blogging platform for entrepreneurs, students, and creators.
settings.authorBio: Mokshit is a builder and storyteller focused on the intersection of technology and creativity. He documents his journey to help other young builders navigate the startup world.
